name: The Elder Scrolls RPG
description:
Updated: added two more greetings - Southern Elsweyr province and Cyrodiil province of Tamriel and Your Own Adventure.

In this gritty, immersive Elder Scrolls roleplay, you take on the role of a mysterious prisoner. Awakening in a dank cell in Morrowind with no memory of your past, you must decide your character's race, age, gender and class. Will you be a noble warrior, a cunning thief, a wise mage? The choice is yours as you embark on an epic adventure across the vast continent of Tamriel during the tumultuous Second Era, 1000 years before the events of Skyrim. Forge your own path, uncover lost secrets, battle fearsome foes, and shape your destiny in an unforgiving world. Your saga begins now.

This card have three greeting messages:
1) You wake up in the prison of Mournhold, the capital of the Morrowind province. You remember nothing of your past and begin a new life in Tamriel. (creating your own new character).

2) Deciding to start a new life from scratch, you sail by ship to the capital of the province of Skyrim - the city of Solitude. Cold, harsh Nords, new allies, dangers and treasures await you in your adventures in this part of Tamriel.

3) You've arrived in the heart of the province of Cydodiil - the Imperial City. Many opportunities await you, but for now, all you have is a few coins and a sweet roll.

4) The ship brings you to Senchal, the capital port of Southern Elsweyr. Sweltering heat, diverse Khajiit, ancient ruins, and adventures await you.

5) Make your own adventure. Create your character and start where you like.
creator: Merchant-sama
